title: デビュー戦の後に・帝王、発進！

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ah, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hehe! ♪ Hey, what do you think?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Don't I seem different to you? Like I've shed my
immaturity and become an adult?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
It was amazing to finally have my debut and enter
the Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'm ready to take on another race! I need to hurry
and catch up with Prez!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
All right, gotta train super hard starting
tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Teio finishes her debut race without a hitch. The
next day...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'm done with my run, Trainer! What's next on the
list?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Teio, the rising star of the Twinkle Series, can
handle any training you throw at her!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Well then. It seems like you had a satisfying
debut.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ah, Air Groove! I'm in the Twinkle Series now too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She starts talking to Air Groove, who already has
experience running in Twinkle Series races.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Haha, indeed. You ran splendidly.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
However, you are merely standing at the starting
line. The real race begins now, Teio.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ugh! I know that! I'm gonna win a whole bunch of
races, just watch me!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Oh, speaking of which, do you want to do some
partner running with me?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You and I? You've just finished your debut race.
Aren't you pushing yourself a little too hard?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Not at all! I'm going to show you the true might of
a rising star!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer. I can run with Air Groove, can't I?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Running with such a veteran racer could prove to
be a valuable teaching moment for her...
choice_data_list: Learn as much as you can!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yay! It's a race, then!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Show me just how strong you are after your
debut.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Gasp... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Uuugh! I lost!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You still need to learn about proper pacing and
timing, it seems.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But that will come with time and experience.
There is no questioning that you are powerful.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
And above all, you have that unrelenting drive in
you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
No wonder the president has taken a shine to
you. That speed and strength of yours will only
increase.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Heh, that much is obvious! I'm aiming to surpass
Prez after all!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Haha. If you're serious about taking her on, then
you must gain considerable power.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: But first, you'll be racing in the Classics, correct?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Of course! First, I gotta become the best of my
peers.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I have to dominate the competition, which means
I need to win all of the Classic Triple Crown races!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I'll be a Triple Crown champion just like Prez!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Which means... Trainer! Enter me in the first
Crown race! The Satsuki Sho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just winning even one of the Classics is quite the
challenge. So the first step is...
choice_data_list: First, we'll test you in the Wakagoma Stakes!
First, we'll test you in the Wakagoma Stakes!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Like a preliminary? Hmm... Well, I do want to see
what my competition is like...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I'll do the Wakagoma Stakes first! And then
it's straight into the Classics!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Haha. Once you finish your classic year, who
knows how far you'll go. I look forward to seeing
you grow.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Air Groove...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
...You sound like a mom when you say things like
that.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: What?! Do not spout such nonsense!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna win a lot of races and get even
stronger, Mom!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Ack! I am not your mother!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With our eyes set on the Classics, we make our
next goal the Wakagoma Stakes.
